message:
feat(tui): add parallel track overview in actionable mode on wide terminals

On terminals >=120 columns with 2+ tracks, actionable mode now shows a
side-by-side 'Parallel Track Overview' after the vertical track list.
Up to 4 tracks are displayed in columns showing track ID, item count,
and top-5 items with IDs and scores.

This gives operators a quick visual comparison of available work streams
without scrolling through the vertical track list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
